# Page Title: Teaching Learning Unit

## Teaching Learning Unit (TLU)

Empowering Education Through Technology and Innovation

The Teaching Learning Unit (TLU) at IIT Jammu plays a pivotal role in shaping and supporting the academic infrastructure of the institute. Established in 2020 during the global shift to online education, TLU was created to ensure a seamless transition from traditional classrooms to digital learning environments. Since then, it has grown into a comprehensive service unit managing both academic and event-related technical operations across the campus.
